tool: ONLY the ncnn-provided pnnx binary (no project code, no numeric oracle)
method: For each <Op>.py: 1) torch.jit.trace -> .pt; 2) pnnx with optlevel=2; 3) SUPPORTED iff returncode==0 AND .ncnn.param has >=1 non-{Input,Output,Split} layer AND NO aten::*/prim::* residual AND every emitted layer name appears in ncnn/src/layer/*.h (or is one of Input/Output/Split/MemoryData). The last clause catches PNNX-only layer names like 'torch.gt' / 'torch.logical_and' / 'F.max_pool2d' which pnnx emits but ncnn's runtime rejects with 'layer X not exists or registered' (verified via pyncnn).

And.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.logical_and']

BitWiseOr.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.bitwise_or']

BitWiseXor.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.bitwise_xor']

BitwiseAnd.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.bitwise_and']

Cast.reason: is an identity op (correctly produces no compute layers)

Conv_with_strides_no_padding.numeric_skip_reason: runner returned no output; tail=/tmp/neto_verify_work/net_runner --param /tmp/pnnx_native_support_work/Conv_with_strides_no_padding/Conv_with_strides_no_padding.ncnn.param --bin /tmp/pnnx_native_support_work/Conv_with_strides_no_padding/Conv_with_strides_no_padding.ncnn.bin --out out0 --outfile /tmp/neto_verify_work/io/out.bin --in in0=/tmp/neto_verify_work/io/in0.bin --in in1=/tmp/neto_verify_work/io/in1.bin

DepthToSpace.numeric_skip_reason: runner returned no output; tail=/tmp/neto_verify_work/net_runner --param /tmp/pnnx_native_support_work/DepthToSpace/DepthToSpace.ncnn.param --bin /tmp/pnnx_native_support_work/DepthToSpace/DepthToSpace.ncnn.bin --out out0 --outfile /tmp/neto_verify_work/io/out.bin --in in0=/tmp/neto_verify_work/io/in0.bin | extract 'out0' failed

Einsum_diagonal.numeric_skip_reason: torch ref failed: RuntimeError: einsum(): subscript i is repeated for operand 0 but the sizes don't match, 1024 != 1

Equal.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.eq']

Gather.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.index_select']

GatherElements.reason: pnnx emits layer ncnn doesn't recognize: ['torch.gather']

Gemm_transposed.numeric_skip_reason: torch ref failed: RuntimeError: mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (32x1 and 128x256)
